title: TrashSlot Compat for Unique Dark Refined
body:
This is an Addon for Unique Dark Refined. It changes the textures of the TrashSlot Mod in order for it to fit UDR's aesthetic. The main resourcepack is required.

Dependencies: [Unique Dark Refined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark-refined) and [TrashSlot](https://modrinth.com/mod/trashslot)

Please consider supporting the aforementioned works and their creators.
